briefing_zh:
今天 AI 研究领域最引人注目的趋势是 **Agent 系统设计范式的深度反思**。alphaxiv 上最热门的论文 **Neural Computers** 来自 Meta AI，提出了一种全新的计算范式——将计算、内存和 I/O 全部内化到神经网络的运行时状态中，原型系统已能直接生成终端界面并控制 GUI 交互，这标志着从"工具调用式 Agent"向"端到端神经计算机"的范式跃迁。与此同时，**SkillClaw** 提出让 Agent 技能通过跨用户交互经验集体进化，其自主"进化器"在实验中带来了 42.1% 的平均性能提升。

在 Agent 能力评测方面，**ClawBench** 发布了一个聚焦"写操作"的真实网站基准测试，涵盖 144 个生产环境网站上的 153 个任务，结果令人警醒：即便是最强的前沿模型成功率也仅 0.7%-33.3%。这与 HuggingFace 上 **DR³-Eval** 对深度研究 Agent 的评测工作形成呼应，表明当前 Agent 在真实复杂任务中的能力仍有巨大差距。

GitHub 方面，**agentic-video-editor** 以 281 星快速崛起，展示了 AI Agent 在创意工具领域的落地趋势。Hacker News 上 **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** 以 1264 分高居榜首，这个仅 3B 激活参数的 MoE 模型将 Agentic coding 能力开放给所有人，反映出开源社区对高效小模型的强烈需求。**Cloudflare** 同步发布了专为 Agent 设计的推理层，基础设施层面的 Agent 支持正在加速成熟。
briefing_en:
Today's most striking trend in AI research is a **deep rethinking of agent system design paradigms**. The hottest paper on alphaxiv, **Neural Computers** from Meta AI, proposes a radical new computing paradigm that internalizes computation, memory, and I/O within a neural model's learned runtime state — prototype NCs can already generate high-fidelity terminal screens and control GUI interactions, signaling a shift from tool-calling agents to end-to-end neural computers. Meanwhile, **SkillClaw** introduces collective skill evolution across users via an autonomous agentic evolver, achieving +42.1% average improvement.

On the evaluation front, **ClawBench** presents a sobering benchmark of 153 write-heavy tasks across 144 live production websites, where even frontier models achieve only 0.7%-33.3% success rates. This echoes HuggingFace's **DR³-Eval** work on deep research agent evaluation, confirming that real-world agent capabilities remain far from production-ready.

On GitHub, **agentic-video-editor** surged to 281 stars, showcasing AI agents entering creative tooling. On Hacker News, **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** dominated with 1264 points — a MoE model with just 3B active parameters bringing agentic coding to everyone. **Cloudflare** simultaneously launched an inference layer designed for agents, accelerating infrastructure-level agent support.
viral_analysis_zh: **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** 以 1264 分碾压 HN 榜单，核心卖点是"3B 激活参数即可媲美大模型的 Agentic coding 能力"，精准击中了开发者对本地部署高性能 Agent 的渴望。**Neural Computers** 在 alphaxiv 获得 3454 次浏览和 182 个赞，"神经计算机"这个概念自带科幻感和想象空间，Meta AI 的品牌背书进一步放大了传播效应。
viral_analysis_en: **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** crushed HN with 1264 points — its core pitch of 'agentic coding power with only 3B active params' precisely targets developers' desire for locally-deployable high-performance agents. **Neural Computers** earned 3454 views and 182 likes on alphaxiv — the sci-fi-esque 'neural computer' concept carries inherent virality, amplified by Meta AI's brand.

huggingface_papers.title: Dive into Claude Code: The Design Space of Today's and Future AI Agent Systems
huggingface_papers.tldr: Analyzes Claude Code's architecture as a case study for AI agent system design, examining how it runs shell commands, edits files, and calls external services. Proposes a design space framework for current and future agentic coding tools.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 以 Claude Code 为案例深入分析 AI Agent 系统设计空间，研究其如何运行 shell 命令、编辑文件和调用外部服务。提出了 Agentic coding 工具的设计框架。
huggingface_papers.authors: Jiacheng Liu, Xiaohan Zhao, Xinyi Shang

huggingface_papers.title: DR^{3}-Eval: Towards Realistic and Reproducible Deep Research Evaluation
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes a realistic and reproducible evaluation framework for Deep Research Agents handling complex, long-horizon research tasks involving planning, retrieval, and synthesis.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出面向深度研究 Agent 的真实可复现评测框架，针对涉及规划、检索和综合的复杂长周期研究任务。
huggingface_papers.authors: Qianqian Xie, Qingheng Xiong, He Zhu

huggingface_papers.title: HiVLA: A Visual-Grounded-Centric Hierarchical Embodied Manipulation System
huggingface_papers.tldr: Introduces a hierarchical embodied manipulation system grounding VLA models in visual reasoning, decomposing manipulation into hierarchical stages with explicit visual grounding.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出以视觉定位为核心的分层具身操作系统，将操作分解为具有显式视觉定位的分层阶段。
huggingface_papers.authors: Tianshuo Yang, Guanyu Chen, Yutian Chen

huggingface_papers.title: UniDoc-RL: Coarse-to-Fine Visual RAG with Hierarchical Actions and Dense Rewards
huggingface_papers.tldr: Combines coarse-to-fine visual RAG with hierarchical actions and dense reward for document understanding. Uses RL to train LVLMs for structured multi-granularity visual retrieval.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 结合粗到细的视觉 RAG、分层动作和密集奖励进行文档理解，用 RL 训练多粒度视觉检索。
huggingface_papers.authors: Jun Wang, Shuo Tan, Zelong Sun

huggingface_papers.title: How to Fine-Tune a Reasoning Model? A Teacher-Student Cooperation Framework to Synthesize Student-Consistent SFT Data
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes a teacher-student cooperation framework for fine-tuning reasoning models using synthetic data from stronger models, balancing reasoning quality with downstream adaptation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出教师-学生合作框架，利用强模型合成数据微调推理模型，平衡推理质量与下游任务适配。
huggingface_papers.authors: Zixian Huang, Kaichen Yang, Xu Huang

alphaxiv_papers.title: SkillClaw: Let Skills Evolve Collectively with Agentic Evolver
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Framework enabling LLM agent skills to collectively evolve through cross-user interaction experiences. An autonomous agentic evolver automatically refines, creates, and updates skills, achieving +42.1% average improvement.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 让 LLM Agent 技能通过跨用户交互经验集体进化的框架。自主进化器自动精炼、创建和更新技能，在多样化真实任务中平均提升 42.1%。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Neural Computers
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Meta AI introduces Neural Computers — a new paradigm where a neural model internalizes computation, memory, and I/O within a learned runtime state. Prototypes generate terminal screens and control GUI interactions from user I/O traces.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Meta AI 提出神经计算机——神经模型在学习的运行时状态中内化计算、内存和 I/O。原型系统可从用户 I/O 痕迹生成终端界面并控制 GUI 交互。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Externalization in LLM Agents: A Unified Review of Memory, Skills, Protocols and Harness Engineering
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Proposes 'externalization' as a unifying principle for LLM agent design — relocating cognitive burdens to persistent external structures (memory, skills, protocols) orchestrated by harness engineering.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 提出外化作为 LLM Agent 设计的统一原则——将认知负担转移到由工程化框架编排的持久外部结构中。

alphaxiv_papers.title: ClawBench: Can AI Agents Complete Everyday Online Tasks?
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Benchmark evaluating AI agents on 153 write-heavy tasks across 144 live production websites. Frontier models achieve only 0.7%-33.3% success, revealing a massive real-world performance gap.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 在 144 个生产环境网站上评测 AI Agent 的 153 个写操作任务。前沿模型成功率仅 0.7%-33.3%，揭示了巨大的真实世界性能差距。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Towards Real-world Human Behavior Simulation: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Long-horizon, Cross-scenario, Heterogeneous Behavior Traces
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Benchmark using real-world industrial data to evaluate LLMs on simulating long-horizon, cross-scenario human behavior. Current LLMs show positivity-and-average bias with max score 44.55.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 使用真实工业数据评估 LLM 模拟长周期、跨场景人类行为的能力。当前 LLM 表现出积极化和平均化偏差。

github_repos.name: poseljacob/agentic-video-editor
github_repos.tldr: AI-powered video editor that turns raw footage and a creative brief into polished video using agentic workflows. Automates editing decisions like cuts, transitions, and pacing.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 驱动的视频编辑器，通过 Agent 工作流将原始素材和创意简报转化为精编视频。

github_repos.name: ChatPRD/tradclaw
github_repos.tldr: AI-powered household management and parenting assistant using agentic frameworks. Open-source alternative for family task coordination.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 驱动的家庭管理和育儿助手，基于 Agent 框架的开源家庭任务协调方案。

github_repos.name: ZeroZ-lab/cc-design
github_repos.tldr: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents. Enables agents to generate production-quality web designs from descriptions.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 面向 AI Agent 的高保真 HTML 设计和原型指导技能。

github_repos.name: AIScientists-Dev/WorldSeed
github_repos.tldr: A world engine where AI agents live autonomously with physical simulation, social interaction, and emergent behavior in a persistent virtual world.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI Agent 自主生存的世界引擎——持久虚拟世界中的物理模拟、社交互动和涌现行为。

github_repos.name: fluentlc/claude-code-java
github_repos.tldr: Java implementation of Claude Code-style AI agent engine. Embeddable in any Java application for agentic coding capabilities.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Claude Code 风格 AI Agent 引擎的 Java 实现，可嵌入任何 Java 应用。

hackernews.title: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Agentic coding power, now open to all
hackernews.tldr: Qwen releases 3.6-35B-A3B, a MoE model with only 3B active parameters delivering strong agentic coding performance. Open-weight release democratizes agent capabilities.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Qwen 发布 3.6-35B-A3B，仅 3B 激活参数的 MoE 模型即具备强大 Agentic coding 能力，开源权重民主化 Agent 能力。

hackernews.title: Cloudflare's AI Platform: an inference layer designed for agents
hackernews.tldr: Cloudflare launches an AI inference platform designed as a layer for AI agents, with optimized routing, caching, and orchestration for agent-to-model communication.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Cloudflare 推出专为 AI Agent 设计的推理平台，提供优化的路由、缓存和编排。

hackernews.title: Are the costs of AI agents also rising exponentially? (2025)
hackernews.tldr: Analysis examining whether AI agent operational costs are rising exponentially alongside capabilities, questioning economic sustainability of agent-heavy workflows.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 分析 AI Agent 运营成本是否随能力指数级增长，质疑 Agent 密集型工作流的经济可持续性。

hackernews.title: Ask HN: How did you land your first projects as a solo engineer/consultant?
hackernews.tldr: Discussion where solo engineers share strategies for landing first projects, with many citing AI agent development as a growing niche.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 独立工程师分享获取首个项目的策略，AI Agent 开发被广泛提及为增长细分市场。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Libretto – Making AI browser automations deterministic
hackernews.tldr: Libretto makes AI browser automations deterministic through structured replay and verification, addressing reliability in browser-based AI agents.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Libretto 通过结构化回放和验证使 AI 浏览器自动化具备确定性，解决可靠性问题。
